title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at State Bank of India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at State Bank of India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the State Bank of India Digital Technologies family as a Risk Analyst in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About State Bank of India Digital Technologies:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India Digital Technologies!
